dataset: GS LinkOps AI Source Evidence Delta

records.source_name: Leaf Space / Infostellar integration public reference

extractable_fields.service_model: Ground Segment as a Service / managed TT&C and payload downlink
extractable_fields.interface_public: API interface and smart scheduler are publicly described for Leaf Line; Infostellar integration should be treated as partner/federation evidence, not as an operational interface specification.

records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful for GSaaS federation logic and partner-adapter modeling; not sufficient for exact commercial terms or per-site RF chain.
records.next_action: Create a GSaaS federation object with provider, partner, interface abstraction, station access scope, settlement_owner, SLA_owner and evidence confidence fields.

records.category: Virtualized ground system / software-defined ground segment
records.source_type: ground-system vendor material / public search evidence
records.confidence_level: Medium. Valuable for system-interface taxonomy, but exact modules and capability limits require vendor datasheets or direct confirmation.
records.next_action: Add 'virtualized ground system' as a separate interface class, distinct from physical station capability and GSaaS operator access.

records.category: Ground station baseband / modem / TT&C equipment

extractable_fields.capability_class: satellite telemetry, tracking and command / modem and baseband processing

records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful to build the baseband-equipment vocabulary; exact supported modulations/coding must be confirmed from datasheets.
records.next_action: Create equipment-level fields under station fingerprint: receiver, modem/baseband, demodulator, decoder, protocol stack, vendor, model, license/export tag.

records.category: Lunar data relay / cislunar communications architecture
records.source_name: Intuitive Machines Lunar Data Network / Khonstellation public references

extractable_fields.network_concept: Lunar Data Network / relay satellites and Earth ground stations for lunar orbit/surface users

records.confidence_level: Medium. Strong for architecture classification; station count, frequency plan and service availability need primary-source confirmation.
records.next_action: Add a non-LEO/cislunar communications path class so GS LinkOps AI can distinguish direct-to-ground, relay-to-ground and surface-network delivery models.

records.category: Lunar surface communications / local payload network
records.source_name: Nokia Bell Labs Lunar Surface Communication System on IM-2

extractable_fields.delivery_path: surface assets to lander, lander to Earth ground station

records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful as a future lunar local-network example; not directly usable for LEO ground-station matching.
records.next_action: Add a 'local mission network' layer in the data model, separate from Earth ground station and relay network layers.

records.confidence_level: Medium. High value for future interface taxonomy; exact operational adoption must be verified per provider/mission.
records.next_action: Add standards fields for cislunar providers: LNIS compatibility, DTN support, navigation service support, relay service class and implementation evidence.
